headline: Constellation Announces Agreement to Sell PJM Generation Assets to LS Power as Part of FERC, U.S. DOJ Resolution of Calpine Transaction
summary: BALTIMORE, March 18, 2026--Constellation and LS Power today announced an agreement under which Constellation will sell a portfolio of generation assets in PJM to LS Power.

headline: Analysts Rally Behind These Nuclear Leaders As White House Unveils Expansion Blitz
summary: Analysts gave favorable comments on nuclear energy suppliers Constellation Energy and Vistra, as the Trump administration launched an initiative to boost its goal of quadrupling U.S. nuclear power.  BNP Paribas initiated coverage of Constellation Energy with an outperform rating and 407 price target Wednesday, according to MT Newswires.  It is the latest bullish recommendation for Constellation, joining 14 other analysts who have buy or outperform ratings.

headline: Forget Tech Stocks and Buy This Energy Stock That's Fueling the AI Boom
summary: Investors chasing the AI boom have crowded into a handful of "AI power" names, often at valuations that assume the future arrives perfectly on schedule. But there's a cheaper, more immediate way to play AI-driven electricity demand through energy, with concrete catalysts already in motion.
